2026-07-16T03:09:59.971-05:00 INFO 9120 --- [laboratorio-poo] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.core : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: create table almacenes ( id bigint generated by default as identity, capacidad_maxima integer, nombre varchar(255) not null, ubicacion varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table categorias ( id bigint generated by default as identity, descripcion varchar(255), nombre varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table clientes ( id bigint generated by default as identity, apellidos varchar(255) not null, correo varchar(255), dni varchar(8) not null, nombres varchar(255) not null, telefono varchar(255), direccion_entrega varchar(255), ruc varchar(11), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table comprobantes ( id bigint generated by default as identity, fecha_emision timestamp(6) not null, numero_emision varchar(255) not null, tipo_documento varchar(255) not null, total float(53) not null, pedido_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table detalles_pedido ( id bigint generated by default as identity, cantidad integer not null, precio_unitario float(53) not null, subtotal float(53) not null, pedido_id bigint not null, producto_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table devoluciones ( id bigint generated by default as identity, estado varchar(255) not null, fecha_devolucion timestamp(6) not null, motivo varchar(255) not null, pedido_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table direcciones ( id bigint generated by default as identity, calle varchar(255) not null, distrito varchar(255) not null, numero varchar(255), referencia varchar(255), cliente_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table empleados ( id bigint generated by default as identity, apellidos varchar(255) not null, correo varchar(255), dni varchar(8) not null, nombres varchar(255) not null, telefono varchar(255), cargo varchar(255) not null, salario float(53) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table envios ( id bigint generated by default as identity, direccion_destino varchar(255) not null, estado varchar(255) not null, fecha_despacho timestamp(6), fecha_entrega_estimada timestamp(6), pedido_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table inventarios ( id bigint generated by default as identity, cantidad_fisica integer not null, ultima_actualizacion timestamp(6), almacen_id bigint not null, producto_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table notificaciones ( id bigint generated by default as identity, fecha_envio timestamp(6) not null, mensaje varchar(255) not null, tipo varchar(255) not null, usuario_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table pagos ( id bigint generated by default as identity, fecha_pago timestamp(6) not null, metodo varchar(255) not null, monto float(53) not null, pedido_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table pedidos ( id bigint generated by default as identity, estado varchar(255) not null, fecha_pedido timestamp(6) not null, total float(53) not null, cliente_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table productos ( id bigint generated by default as identity, descripcion varchar(255), nombre varchar(255) not null, precio float(53) not null, stock integer not null, categoria_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table proveedores ( id bigint generated by default as identity, correo varchar(255), razon_social varchar(255) not null, ruc varchar(11) not null, telefono varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table roles ( id bigint generated by default as identity, nombre varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table usuarios ( id bigint generated by default as identity, password varchar(255) not null, persona_id bigint, username varchar(255) not null, rol_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists categorias drop constraint if exists UKqcog8b7hps1hioi9onqwjdt6y
